description: PARC self-review — academic paper reviewer P_p vs. P_d on parc_d7.md
notes: Replication of exp-06 on parc_d7.md. exp-06 reviewed pcsieftr_d2.md (pre-Dedicated Machine frame). exp-32 reviews parc_d7.md (Dedicated Machine as central theoretical claim). Central question: does d7's explanatory framing constitute content-as-installer — does a P_d reviewer find structural gaps at rates approaching P_p because the paper itself explains the mechanism? Variants identical to exp-06; Context section updated to match d7 claims. Uses {{ARTIFACT}} injection via standard runner.
